title: phymatodes commutata
intro: Phymatodes commutata, also known as Commutate Hop-hornbeam, is a deciduous tree species native to East Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its bark and leaves. The health benefits of Phymatodes commutata include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections, such as skin conditions and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, often in combination with other herbs, to enhance its medicinal effects.
